ogTitle: Wamuran vs Wamuran Basin: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wamuran and Wamuran Basin.
heading: Wamuran vs Wamuran Basin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wamuran, Queensland and Wamuran Basin, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wamuran has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Wamuran Basin (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wamuran or Wamuran Basin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wamuran has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Wamuran Basin scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wamuran scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Wamuran Basin scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wamuran or Wamuran Basin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wamuran has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
